name: Honey Nut White Fudge
recipeIngredient: 12-ounce package NESTLE TOLL HOUSE Premier White Morsels
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, evaporated milk, and sugar in a medium, heavy saucepan.
2. Bring mixture to a full rolling boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
3. Boil for 4 1/2 to 5 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove from heat.
4. Stir in marshmallows, morsels, 1 cup of peanuts, and vanilla extract vigorously for 1 minute or until marshmallows are melted.
5. Pour mixture into a foil-lined 9-inch square baking pan.
6. Coarsely chop the remaining peanuts; sprinkle over fudge and press down gently.
7. Chill until firm. Remove foil before cutting into squares.
